name: Coverage: Soft delete and Undo restore event
description: Create event, delete it, click Undo, verify event returns on calendar.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Click + Add Event, title TS Undo Restore, Save, wait 3 seconds
Open TS Undo Restore and click Delete, confirm if prompted
Verify an Undo banner or deleted message for TS Undo Restore is shown
Verify TS Undo Restore is visible again on the calendar
